title: JupyterLite AI Chat
description: Configuration for JupyterLite AI chat behavior

sendWithShiftEnter.title: Send with Shift+Enter
sendWithShiftEnter.description: Use Shift+Enter to send messages (Enter creates new line)

autoTitle.title: Auto Title
autoTitle.description: Automatically request a title from the model for every message until there are 5 messages

showTokenUsage.title: Show Token Usage
showTokenUsage.description: Display token usage information in the chat toolbar

showContextUsage.title: Show Context Usage
showContextUsage.description: Display estimated context usage percentage in the chat toolbar

chatBackupDirectory.title: Chat Backup Directory
chatBackupDirectory.description: Directory where chat history backups are saved, relative to the server root. Default is the server root.
